notes: Running the DX10 version works, other options crash after a few seconds.
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: Like other reports have mentioned, choosing "UE4 No options menu" allows the game to start. I noticed occasional graphical glitches (parts of the screen would be blurred until I moved the camera) but don't know if those were due to Proton or the game itself. BeamNG export works if you first run ln -s ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/284160/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My\ Documents/BeamNG.drive/mods ~/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/293760/pfx/drive_c/users/steamuser/My\ Documents/BeamNG.drive/mods (after having installed and launched both games at least once) to give Automation access to the BeamNG mods folder in BeamNG's proton prefix.
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: Worked 110% fine ONLY if I selected the "Play Automation - No Launcher" option as It seems the launcher doesn't work.
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: Game starts but stuck on the initial loading screen. Uses CPU but ram usages is stuck. Starting without launcher. Forcing dx10 has no effect. Testes on intel igpu and amd dgpu. It seems using an older version of proton makes the process go further as more ram is used
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: Runs if you bypass the launcher. BeamNG export works but you might symlink the prefixes, as they are separated by default !
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: Game works if you select "No launcher option". The only thing that doesn't work is workshop mods for whatever reason (although they did worked earlier)
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes:
Graphics quite buggy and UI not always appearing properly, but game is perfectly playable nonetheless.
Tried various tweaks with little success (Worse graphics to proton not responding).
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes:
Have to select "Play Automation - No Launcher".
Game crashes if you try to "render video to disk" in the photo editor.
Other than this, no issues and runs VERY smooth!
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: When "start with no launcher" option is selected game works out of the box, but with no workshop support. Installing dotnet452 and manually setting windows version to win7 through wine/protontricks is required to make the launcher and workshop mods work.
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game

notes: Some changes (loading bodies, etc) can be a tad sluggish but nothing crashed. Runs perfectly fine without the launcher - no other changes were required.
title: Automation - The Car Company Tycoon Game
